segments: : لَا تَدَعُوا قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ طه فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ یُحِبُّهَا وَ یُحِبُّ مَنْ قَرَأَهَا وَ مَنْ أَدْمَنَ قِرَاءَتَهَا أَعْطَاهُ اللَّهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ کِتابَهُ بِیَمِینِهِ* وَ لَمْ یُحَاسِبْهُ بِمَا عَمِلَ فِی الْإِسْلَامِ وَ أُعْطِیَ فِی الْآخِرَهِ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ حَتَّی یَرْضَی.
arabic.text: : لَا تَدَعُوا قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ طه فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ یُحِبُّهَا وَ یُحِبُّ مَنْ قَرَأَهَا وَ مَنْ أَدْمَنَ قِرَاءَتَهَا أَعْطَاهُ اللَّهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ کِتابَهُ بِیَمِینِهِ* وَ لَمْ یُحَاسِبْهُ بِمَا عَمِلَ فِی الْإِسْلَامِ وَ أُعْطِیَ فِی الْآخِرَهِ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ حَتَّی یَرْضَی.

segments: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sabah al-Hadha from Ishaq b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Don’t miss the recitation of Surah Taha because Allah loves that Surah and its reciters. If a person recites it regularly, the Almighty Allah would give him scroll of deeds in his right hand on the Day of Judgment. There would be no accounting for his deeds, which he had done after accepting Islam and he would get so many rewards in the hereafter that he would be pleased.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sabah al-Hadha from Ishaq b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Don’t miss the recitation of Surah Taha because Allah loves that Surah and its reciters. If a person recites it regularly, the Almighty Allah would give him scroll of deeds in his right hand on the Day of Judgment. There would be no accounting for his deeds, which he had done after accepting Islam and he would get so many rewards in the hereafter that he would be pleased.”

narratorChain.raw: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ صَبَّاحٍ الْحَذَّاءِ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ
